## Qaid v0.1.1 — Custom-mode teams + version footer

### New: Custom + teams
Custom mode can now be played as **two teams** instead of free-for-all. The Setup screen's "Teams" toggle is fully wired through the engine — per-player scoring stays the same, but win detection rolls the per-player totals up to team totals.

- Works with both `highest wins` and `lowest wins` rules
- Reuses the same team scoreboard used for Kout (crown badge, dealer indicator, delta animation)
- Recent-games log records team scores as `A–B`

### New: version footer
A small `v0.1.1` chip sits at the bottom of every screen so users know which build they're on. Wired via Vite `define` from `package.json` at build time.

### Housekeeping
- Removed unused `translations.csv`
- 5 new Vitest cases for Custom + teams winner detection (36/36 total)
- Live on Netlify (HTTPS, PWA-ready)

### Compatibility
**No breaking changes.** `localStorage["cardScoreTracker_v1"]` shape is unchanged — existing saved games continue to load. The `playerTeam` field already existed and now carries data for Custom games when teams are configured.
